sprint.goal: Wire Go kernel into npm hook path (#955) — 100x latency win for every npm user

go-hook-wiring.task: Wire Go binary into claude-hook.ts: detect Go binary, pre-resolve YAML/pack to flat JSON, delegate to Go evaluate, fall back to TS on failure (#955)
go-hook-wiring.notes: Go binary ships via postinstall but hooks still evaluate through TS at 290ms. Go does it in 2-3ms. Two parts: (1) claude-hook.ts delegates to Go, (2) TS pre-resolves pack: and YAML policies to flat JSON for Go stdin. All blockers cleared — ready to start.
